name: 18.25 fl oz PolyPro Short Tumbler Transparent Coral Pink - Room Essentials™
description:
Add a splash of color to your drinkware with the 18.25-Fluid-Ounce PolyPro Short Tumbler from Room Essentials™. Crafted with 20% post-consumer recycled plastic, this BPA-free tumbler in coral pink is both practical and stylish. Suitable for serving both hot and cold beverages, it's dishwasher safe for easy cleaning and microwave safe for reheating only.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
